commands.name: build-image
commands.description: Build a Docker container image for a container plugin

options.name: --image
options.description:
Override the image name/tag from manifest
(e.g. myregistry.azurecr.io/plugins/movies:1.0.0)

options.name: --skip-build
options.description:
Skip 'dotnet build' (use if already built)
Prerequisites:
- Docker must be running
- Plugin must have ExecutionMode = Container in its manifest
- Plugin .csproj must include <PublishProfile>DefaultContainer</PublishProfile>

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Scaffold a new plugin project (optionally with UI template)

commands.name: from-schema
commands.description: Generate a compiled plugin from a DynamicApp JSON schema

commands.name: generate-manifest
commands.description: Extract manifest from compiled DLL and write extension.manifest.json

options.name: --overlay
options.description:
Optional overlay JSON for UI contributions and
other metadata not in the SDK PluginManifest

options.name: --headless
options.description: Suppress warning for missing UI contributions

commands.name: package
commands.description: Build, bundle, and sign a .ccpkg package (auto-builds Docker image for container plugins)

options.name: --internal
options.description:
Use ProjectReference to EthisysCore.Plugin.Sdk (for developers
working inside the EthisysCore repo). This is the default.
Omit this flag for external clients who use the NuGet package.

options.name: --template
options.description: UI framework template: html, react, or vue

options.name: --mode
options.description: Execution mode: in-process (default), out-of-process, or container

options.name: --layered
options.description: Use 4-project Clean Architecture (Domain, Application, Infrastructure, Plugin)
